Antigua ~ Peony Blossom Geisha COE Sister Batch (Washed)

Estate: Finca Pixcaya (if the pronunciation is difficult, we can 
call it Pixcaya Estate) COE Winner 2011, 2012, 2013, 2017,
 2018

Flavor: Peach, citrus, pomelo, Earl Grey tea, bergamot.
Elegant white flowers with a subtle dried rose aroma,
 milk candy, clean cup profile, and a long-lasting finish.
Antigua ~ Bourbon Dynasty Louis XV Pointed Bourbon Natural Process

Flavor: Almond, cherry, osmanthus, orange, yellow citrus, 
floral sweetness.Peach and toffee notes.
Antigua ~ Stardust Angel Raphael (Anaerobic Natural Process)

Flavor: Floral notes: Jasmine and orange blossom aromas
 stand out.Fruit notes: Bright and lively citrus, peach, apricot,
 and tropical fruit aromas.(As this is the third year of grafted 
Geisha cultivation, its profile differs from mature Geisha 
varieties.)
The Knights of Tibis Holy Order (Natural Geisha) SCA 89.5
Variety: F Geisha / M Sudan — Sudanese Geisha descendant

Flavor: Macadamia nut, grapefruit peel, cacao nibs, and 
frangipani aroma.Rich sweet-acid structure with 
bright and juicy acidity; smooth, syrup-like mouthfeel.
A long and delicate finish preserves the flavors and aromas, 
with a subtle fresh cedarwood note.
Mandala Flower Geisha Washed MG2 Generation

Variety: MG2 Geisha (father line: Tanzania Geisha, 
mother line: new Geisha variety derived from Elephant Bean)

Flavor: Bright tropical fruit aromas blend with an elegant 
green tea character, accompanied by delicate layers of nuts 
and citrus.Fresh and juicy on the palate, with a soft honey-like 
sweetness and gentle acidity.The finish reveals a refreshing 
watermelon-like sweetness.
Estate: Cloud Mist Estate (Finca de Coatan)
Roast Recommendation: Medium-Light to Dark Roast

Flavor: Milk chocolate and orange peel aromas, with a
 balanced and smooth body.
The finish carries delicate white floral notes with a rich and 
silky texture.
